works.title: Thematic Experience Design
works.description: Making the interface an extension of the game world. I specialize in weaving worldview narratives into interaction details, creating a strong sense of immersion through stylized layouts, lore-aligned motion effects and sound design.
works.case: Designed mech-core charging and transformation animations with a strong mechanical feel for 'Counter-Strike: Future'.

images.title: Design Approach
images.text: Detailed description of the design approach, user research, and interaction flows for this project. Showcasing the thinking process and solutions behind the design. Through in-depth user research and competitive analysis, we identified the core design direction.

images.title: Visual Design
images.text: Detailed description of the visual design, color usage, and layout for this project. The color system was selected based on brand identity and target audience aesthetic preferences, ensuring consistency and professionalism in visual communication.

images.title: Interaction Design
images.text: Detailed description of the interaction design, user flows, and motion effects for this project. Every micro-interaction has been meticulously refined to ensure smooth and intuitive user operations.

works.title: Gameplay Interaction Design
works.description: Bringing intuitive interaction to hardcore gameplay. I focus on operation design for combat, strategy and other core mechanics, pursuing precise, fluid and distraction-free battlefield experiences that maintain player flow.
works.case: Continuously optimized the feel and feedback logic for shooting, aiming and throwable operations in CrossFire Mobile.

works.title: Monetization UX Design
works.description: Achieving commercial value with elegance. I seamlessly integrate monetization systems into the player journey, simplifying payment paths, enhancing visual presentation and guiding flow to create a win-win for users and business.
works.case: Led the design of season battle passes and gacha event interfaces across multiple games, with data showing significant improvements in user engagement and willingness to pay.

images.title: Piggybank System Flow
images.text: A comprehensive user flow mapping the piggybank savings mechanic — a monetization feature designed to incentivize incremental spending through visual progress and reward anticipation. The flow details each touchpoint from initial deposit prompts, accumulation tracking, milestone rewards to final redemption, ensuring a frictionless and psychologically engaging path that drives both retention and revenue.

images.title: Design Approach
images.text: Detailed description of the design approach, user research, and interaction flows for this project. Showcasing the thinking process and solutions behind the design. Through in-depth user research and competitive analysis, we identified the core design direction.

images.title: Piggybank Interaction Demo
images.text: Two core interaction demos of the piggybank savings system — depositing coins into the piggybank and withdrawing coins from it. These micro-interactions are designed with satisfying visual feedback and smooth motion to reinforce the savings habit loop and create an emotionally rewarding user experience.

images.title: Final Production Preview
images.text: A walkthrough of the fully implemented piggybank feature as it appears in the live product. This recording captures the end-to-end user journey — from the entry prompt and coin deposit animation, through balance accumulation with real-time visual feedback, to the final reward redemption moment. Every transition, particle effect and haptic cue has been polished to production quality, demonstrating how the design vision translates into a seamless and delightful in-game experience.

works.title: Cross-Platform UX Design
works.description: Experience consistency above all else. With interaction design experience across mobile, PC, console and XR devices, I tailor optimal interaction solutions based on each device's input characteristics and usage scenarios.
works.case: Participated in the interaction adaptation of CrossFire: Rainbow PC version, conducting deep optimization for keyboard and mouse controls.

works.title: Global Localization Design
works.description: User experiences that transcend cultures. Familiar with overseas market user habits and cultural differences, I adapt interaction flows, information hierarchy and visual symbols for localization, ensuring product acceptance in global markets.
works.case: Led the UI layout and interaction logic adjustments for the Southeast Asian version, passing local user usability testing.

works.title: System Design
works.description: Building scalable and consistent design systems. I architect comprehensive UI component libraries, define design tokens, typography scales and spacing systems to ensure visual consistency across products while accelerating team collaboration and development efficiency.
works.case: Established a unified design system for FPS game franchises, standardizing over 200 reusable components across multiple game titles and platforms.

images.title: Design Tokens & Foundations
images.text: Establishing the foundational layer of the design system including color palettes, typography scales, spacing units, elevation systems and motion curves. These design tokens serve as the single source of truth, ensuring pixel-perfect consistency across all platforms and products.

images.title: Card Design
images.text: Designing versatile and reusable card components that serve as the fundamental building blocks across products. Each card variant is crafted with flexible layouts, consistent spacing and adaptive content areas to accommodate diverse use cases — from player profiles and item showcases to notification panels and data summaries.

images.title: Icon Design
images.text: Crafting a cohesive and scalable icon system that communicates functionality at a glance. Each icon is designed on a unified grid with consistent stroke weights, corner radii and optical balance, ensuring pixel-perfect clarity across all resolutions. The icon library covers navigation, actions, status indicators and game-specific elements, maintaining visual harmony throughout the entire product ecosystem.

images.title: System Design Gallery
images.text: A curated collection of system design deliverables showcasing UI components, layout patterns, design specifications and visual guidelines. Each piece demonstrates the systematic approach to building scalable and consistent design systems across multiple products and platforms.

works.title: Creative Experience Solution
works.description: Designing an immersive card-based gameplay experience that blends strategic depth with visual storytelling. From user flow architecture to card illustration and interactive prototyping, this project demonstrates a full-cycle creative solution — transforming a complex game mechanic into an intuitive, engaging and visually stunning player experience.
works.case: Led the end-to-end UX design of a collectible card battle system for an FPS game, encompassing interaction flow mapping, card visual design and motion prototype delivery, resulting in a highly engaging in-game feature.

images.title: User Flow Architecture
images.text: Mapping the complete card gameplay interaction journey from entry to resolution. The user flow covers card pack opening with dramatic reveal animations, strategic card selection and placement on the battlefield, real-time card effect activation with visual feedback, and the final battle outcome presentation. Each step is carefully designed to maintain player engagement while providing clear information hierarchy and intuitive navigation between states.

images.title: Interactive Prototype Demo
images.text: A high-fidelity motion prototype showcasing the card system's core interaction loops in action. The demo walks through the full gameplay flow — from browsing the card collection, selecting and deploying cards onto the battlefield, to witnessing real-time card ability animations and battle resolution sequences. This prototype was used to validate interaction timing, transition smoothness and overall user experience before development handoff.

images.title: Card Visual Design System
images.text: A comprehensive set of collectible card illustrations featuring diverse character archetypes — from armored warriors and mutant creatures to tactical operatives and mythical beings. Each card is designed with a unified frame structure incorporating rarity indicators, attribute icons and dynamic action poses. The visual language balances dark sci-fi aesthetics with vibrant color accents, ensuring each card feels unique while maintaining systematic consistency across the entire collection.
